name: G — Off-Market Lead Ingestor (Apify → Portal API)
description: Recebe leads do Apify via webhook, normaliza e chama POST /api/offmarket-leads/manual (auto-pipeline completo: score + price-intel + match-buyers + deal-eval). Nunca escreve directamente no Supabase.

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Deal Machine <noreply@agencygroup.pt>', to: ['geral@agencygroup.pt'], subject: '🔥 Off-Market Score Alto: ' + $json.nome + ' (' + $json.computed_score + '/100 Tier ' + $json.tier + ')', text: 'LEAD OFF-MARKET

Nome: ' + $json.nome + '
Score: ' + $json.computed_score + '/100 Tier ' + $json.tier + '
Cidade: ' + ($json.cidade||'—') + '
Preço: ' + ($json.price_ask ? '€' + Number($json.price_ask/1000).toFixed(0) + 'K' : '—') + '
Fonte: ' + ($json.source||'apify') + '
Portal: ' + $env.PORTAL_URL + '/portal' }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const lead = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', id: lead.id || lead.lead_id, score: lead.computed_score, tier: lead.tier, nome: lead.nome } }];
